## 0.14.0 (2019-04-12)[¶](https://fastapi.tiangolo.com/release-notes/#0140-2019-04-12)
  * Improve automatically generated names of _path operations_ in OpenAPI (in API docs). A function `read_items` instead of having a generated name "Read Items Get" will have "Read Items". PR
  * Add docs for: [Testing **FastAPI**](https://fastapi.tiangolo.com/tutorial/testing/). PR
  * Update `/docs` Swagger UI to enable deep linking. This allows sharing the URL pointing directly to the _path operation_ documentation in the docs. PR
  * Update development dependencies, `Pipfile.lock`. PR
  * Include Falcon and Hug in: [Alternatives, Inspiration and Comparisons](https://fastapi.tiangolo.com/alternatives/).
